column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for our area. Stay tuned for further updates on your ABC Action News Station.
Everyone stay safe
Best weather of the summer. Nice and cool and no sun!
totally agree! I had a great little walk at 6:40 am today
me too it was breezy and comfy!
hey, Gina!
hey Joyce!!!
Thanks for the heads up!
Great a tornado on top of a prison....
no. It's more west and in the cows and orange. I just hope the ppl out there are safe
well I guess it would be better on top of the prison 😂
yes if it's the right one, maybe.
Someone is on ABC, they’re going over the storm rotation/possible tornado & warnings, but it’s a lady’s voice & the radar.
they have other meteorologists. Maybe Nadeen. https://www.abcactionnews.com/about-us/staff
It was Shay, the camera finally panned out & it was Shay, I just didn’t recognize her voice
Only part of these storms that freak me out.

for good reason. I experienced one in NH once. The entire wall and bay window bucked in, than shattered. Trees in the air everywhere, and the neighborhood looked like a war zone. A true hit the deck situation. Never want to be in one again.
I live in a mobile home so definitely freaks me out.
